caption: A soccer player wearing a light blue long-sleeved jersey with "Fly Emirates" and black pants practices on a green field in a stadium with red seating. In the beginning, he stands near a red perimeter barrier featuring the word "ROMBULL" in white letters. A coach in a black outfit stands nearby as two soccer balls sit on the grass. As the sequence progresses, the player moves toward the center of the field. He is later seen kicking a ball forward. The background displays various sponsors and logos, including "COVIRAN," "PULEVA," and "LaLiga Santander." A timestamp of "21:12" is visible in the bottom left corner of the footage. The scene transitions from a wide shot of the player and coach to a broader view of the stadium's advertising boards and the player continuing his drill on the turf.
